column1: Trea Turner sits firmly atop today’s Beat The Streak board, leading off in a hitter’s paradise at Colorado with a rock-solid 73% hit probability—prime territory for a steady bat in a top-of-order role. Jonathan Aranda follows closely, boasting a strong matchup thanks to his lefty stick facing a right-hander and a favorable slot near the top of the lineup. Yandy Diaz and Brendan Donovan round out the list, each offering reliable profiles and high contact rates, but Turner’s blend of speed, opportunity, and park factor makes him the clear-cut pick to keep your streak alive.
